query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.title,
  c.company,
  c.email,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.roleRelevance,
  c.rejectionReason,
  c.linkedinUrl,
  GROUP_CONCAT(pc.projectId) as linkedProjectIds
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN projectContacts pc ON pc.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.id IN (1080026, 1080027, 1080028)
GROUP BY c.id;
